overview.short: Thirupalkadal Sreekrishna Temple (Thiruparkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple) is one of the oldest Hindu temples dedicated to the Hindu God Vishnu (worshipped as Krishna), located in th
overview.description: Thirupalkadal Sreekrishna Temple (Thiruparkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple) is one of the oldest Hindu temples dedicated to the Hindu God Vishnu (worshipped as Krishna), located in the village Keezhperoor, Chirayinkeezhu Taluk, Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, India. The central icon is a four-armed standing Vishnu carrying the conch Panchajanya (Turbinella pyrum), the discus Sudarshana Chakra, the mace Kaumodaki and a butter with a holy basil garland. The principal deity, Krishna (Thirupalkadal Bhattarakar) was the family deity of Ay dynasty. It is believed that Kulashekhara Alvar, considered the s

topPlaces.name: Keezhperoor
topPlaces.description: Keezhperoor (kīḻpērūr, Kilapperur, Kizhperur) or Kupaka is a village located 6 kilometers from Kilimanoor in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala. It houses Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple, family temple of Venad, Kizhakkumkara Devi Temple, and Thekkumkara Mahadeva Temple.

topPlaces.name: Vellalloor
topPlaces.description: Vellalloor is a village in Nagaroor grama panchayat Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. The village is full of lush green paddy fields.

topPlaces.name: Kudavoor
topPlaces.description: Kudavoor is a village in Mangalapuram panchayat of Thiruvananthapuram Taluk in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kilimanoor Palace
topPlaces.description: Kilimanoor Palace is a palace located in Kilimanoor, in the Indian state of Kerala. It is the birthplace of painter Raja Ravi Varma and Raghava Varma, the father of king Marthanda Varma.

topPlaces.name: Madavoor-Pallickal
topPlaces.description: Madavoor is a village located on the Kollam -Trivandrum border, which was previously part of the old Kollam district. It is now under the Varkala Taluk of the Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Pazhayakunnummel
topPlaces.description: Pazhayakunnummel is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thattathumala
topPlaces.description: Thattathumala is a town in Trivandrum district of, Kerala, India. It is situated 3 km from Kilimanoor city center on the MC/SH 1 Road.

topPlaces.name: Kilimanoor
topPlaces.description: Kilimanoor is a panchayat and a town in the Varkala taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in Kerala, India. It is located on MC/SH 1 Road, 33 kilometres (21 mi) northwest of the city of Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum), 14 km (8.7 mi) east of Attingal and 20 km (12 mi) east of Varkala.

items.note: Keezhperoor (kīḻpērūr, Kilapperur, Kizhperur) or Kupaka is a village located 6 kilometers from Kilimanoor in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala. It houses Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple, family temple of Venad, Kizhakkumkara Devi Temple, and Thekkumkara Mahadeva Temple.

Kudavoor is a village in Mangalapuram panchayat of Thiruvananthapuram Taluk in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India.
Kilimanoor Palace is a palace located in Kilimanoor, in the Indian state of Kerala. It is the birthplace of painter Raja Ravi Varma and Raghava Varma, the father of king Marthanda Varma.

Madavoor is a village located on the Kollam -Trivandrum border, which was previously part of the old Kollam district. It is now under the Varkala Taluk of the Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India.

Kilimanoor is a panchayat and a town in the Varkala taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in Kerala, India. It is located on MC/SH 1 Road, 33 kilometres (21 mi) northwest of the city of Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum), 14 km (8.7 mi) east of Attingal and 20 km (12 mi) east of Varkala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirupalkadal Sreekrishnaswamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Keezhperoor, Vellalloor, Kudavoor, Kilimanoor Palace, Madavoor-Pallickal.
